mnemonics: PLACE To Control Software Projects: Planning, Leading, Actuating (Executing), Controlling
keyPoints: Project Planning: Defining scope, schedule, resources, and cost estimates.
Project Monitoring & Control: Tracking progress, managing changes, and mitigating risks.
Project Leadership: Guiding the team, managing stakeholders, and ensuring effective communication.
commonMistakes: Focusing only on the technical work and neglecting the management activities.
Underestimating the effort required for risk management and change control.
Assuming planning is a one-time activity at the start of the project rather than an ongoing process.
